title: Formal invariant property suite for all three circuits
description: Write machine-checkable invariant properties covering: (1) no field overflow — all uint64 signals stay within [0, 2^64) after range checks, (2) nullifier uniqueness — for any two distinct (secret, scope) or (credCommitment, nonce) pairs the nullifier outputs differ, (3) scope monotonicity — in Delegation, delegateeScope AND NOT delegatorScope == 0 for all valid witnesses, (4) expiry narrowing — delegateeExpiry <= delegatorExpiry. Deliver as a property specification file (Certora CVL or equivalent assertion harness in circom_tester) with at least 15 named properties and a CI-runnable test script.
